response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video: 00:00-04:32 is a slideshow; 04:32-04:56 is a concert performance of 'Kirameki Rider ☆' by Hololive 3rd Gen. 2. Identified the song 'Kirameki Rider ☆' (キラメキライダー☆). 3. Searched for official lyrics. 4. Provided the full lyrics in Japanese and English translation.
response.global_summary: The video starts with a slideshow showcasing fan messages and artwork celebrating the Hololive 3rd generation concert, followed by a brief clip of the 3rd generation members (Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, and Shirogane Noel) on stage at the start of their concert performing the song 'Kirameki Rider ☆'.

scenes.description: A slideshow featuring messages, fan art, and information related to the hololive 3rd generation concert. No vocal music is playing.
The Hololive 3rd generation members (Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, and Shirogane Noel) appear on stage at the concert, beginning their performance of 'Kirameki Rider ☆'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's make our newborn heartbeats echo
With the best times, and the best friends
Ride on the sparkle ☆ (Yay)

Can you remember? That very first song (So nostalgic)
My voice was trembling (Just a little bit)
The future that continued from that day
Is this day that I've seized with everyone

More and more and more and more, my accelerating heart
(Together) Let's go anywhere
(Are you ready?) Is the preparation okay?
Open!! The door to our dreams (1 2 3)
(Kirameki Rider ☆)

Let's make our newborn heartbeats echo
With the best times, and the best friends
I'm right here because you found me
I came here because I wanted to meet you
Let's sing together
A never-ending melody
Ride on the sparkle ☆

Can you hear it? My voice (Clearly)
What I want to send to you is a smile (That smile!)
I was frustrated by the distance to my ideals
But I laughed and cried with everyone

Hold it tight, tight, tight, tight, and embrace everything
(Together) Let's go anywhere
(Are you ready?) Is the preparation okay!
Advance!! On the road of hope (1 2 3)
(Kirameki Rider ☆)

I want to play my favorite feelings in color
In the best place, with the best people
I'm right here, this is not a hallucination
So that your heart is dyed in happiness
Layering harmonies
Wrapped in sparkle ☆

I want to keep singing, I want to keep dancing
Is that wish and selfishness okay?
Because it's too fun!
It won't stop anymore!!
On the shining stage, more and more!!
(Please) Forever!!
(Oh) (Yay)

I can't just talk about happiness, fun, and love
I still have worries now and then
I'm here, I'm right here
Looking at the same world as you
(Let's go!) (Kirameki Rider ☆)

Let's make our newborn heartbeats echo
With the best times, and the best friends
I'm right here because you found me
I came here because I wanted to meet you
Let's sing together
(Ready?)
A never-ending melody
Ride on the sparkle ☆
Wrapped in sparkle ☆
(Yay!)
